text:
Once upon a time in a quirky town called Chuckleberry, a peculiar raccoon named Roo-Roo ran a bakery filled with baked peculiarities. Every day, Roo-Roo would sprinkle fairy dust on her famous chocolate chip cookies, and they would glow as though sprinkled by the stars themselves.

One extraordinary morning, while frolicking in the cherry blossoms, Roo-Roo heard a fluttering sound. Upbeat humming filled the air. Twigs flittered. She caught sight of a dragonfly with tunes, who buzzed right to her.*

"I've been listening to your singing," said the dragonfly, his wings a blur.

"Battery-powered?" Roo-Roo asked curiously.

"Um, practically." The dragonfly flickered ominously.

Just then, a cloud of butterflies fluttered out of nowhere, creating a symphony of buzzing.

"No chance!" Roo-Roo laughed. "That's impossible!"

The dragonfly winked.
"Don’t laugh too hard.
